proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e` equals 1 have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e` equals 0.
The strongest BRAF dependency subgroup is cell lines where `braf_v600e` equals 1 and `brca2_loss` equals 1; this subgroup has more negative `dependency_BRAF` than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch comparison: dependency_BRAF by braf_v600e == 1 versus 0.
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_BRAF was -0.8047 when braf_v600e=1 (n=5574) versus -0.2495 otherwise; effect=-0.5552, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise subgroup screen over 88 feature predicates; reported top BRAF pair.
analyses.result_summary: Top BRAF subgroup screen result: `braf_v600e` equals 1 AND `brca2_loss` equals 1 had mean dependency_BRAF -0.8350 (n=295) versus -0.3083 otherwise; subgroup effect=-0.5267, interaction=-0.0351, interaction p=0.1169.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `egfr_amplification` equals 1 have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines without `egfr_amplification`.
EGFR dependency is concentrated in the subgroup where `egfr_amplification` equals 1 and `lineage_subtype` is "basal"; this subgroup has more negative `dependency_EGFR` than other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch comparison: dependency_EGFR by egfr_amplification == 1 versus 0.
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_EGFR was -0.6010 for egfr_amplification=1 (n=3880) versus -0.2524 otherwise; effect=-0.3486, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise subgroup screen over 88 feature predicates; reported top EGFR pair.
analyses.result_summary: Top EGFR subgroup screen result: `egfr_amplification` equals 1 AND `lineage_subtype` is "basal" had mean dependency_EGFR -0.6610 (n=124) versus -0.2785 otherwise; subgroup effect=-0.3825, interaction=-0.0546, interaction p=0.0970.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification` equals 1 have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines without `erbb2_amplification`.
ERBB2 dependency is strongest in cell lines where `erbb2_amplification` equals 1 and `lineage_subtype` is "her2_enriched"; this subgroup has more negative `dependency_ERBB2` than other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch comparison: dependency_ERBB2 by erbb2_amplification == 1 versus 0.
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_ERBB2 was -0.6856 for erbb2_amplification=1 (n=4890) versus -0.2535 otherwise; effect=-0.4321, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Welch comparison: dependency_KRAS by kras_mutation == 1 versus 0.
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_KRAS was -0.5594 for kras_mutation=1 (n=11842) versus -0.2520 otherwise; effect=-0.3075, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise subgroup screen over 88 feature predicates; reported top KRAS pair.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines where `nf1_loss` equals 1 have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than other cell lines.
RIT1 dependency is concentrated in the subgroup where `nf1_loss` equals 1 and `lineage` is "brain"; this subgroup has more negative `dependency_RIT1` than other cell lines.

analyses.code: Systematic single-predicate screen for dependency_RIT1 across all molecular, lineage, and screen feature predicates.
analyses.result_summary: Best single RIT1 predicate was `nf1_loss` equals 1: mean dependency_RIT1 -0.3527 (n=4560) versus -0.2572 otherwise; effect=-0.0955, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise subgroup screen over 88 feature predicates; reported top RIT1 pair.
analyses.result_summary: Top RIT1 subgroup screen result: `nf1_loss` equals 1 AND `lineage` is "brain" had mean dependency_RIT1 -0.4047 (n=329) versus -0.2650 otherwise; subgroup effect=-0.1397, interaction=-0.0582, interaction p=0.0056.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines where `lineage` is "colorectal" have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.
KIF18A dependency is strongest in cell lines where `lineage` is "colorectal" and `apc_mutation` equals 1; this subgroup has more negative `dependency_KIF18A` than other cell lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines where `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is high (>= 0.964) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Best single TMED10 predicate was `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is high (>= 0.964): mean dependency_TMED10 -0.2816 (n=12577) versus -0.2447 otherwise; effect=-0.0369, p=<1e-300.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise subgroup screen over 88 feature predicates; reported top TMED10 pair.
